songs.title: Outbound
feed: “Outbound” by After reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Outbound” by After reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 39 spots to #1.
“Outbound” by After climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 39 spots to #1.
“Outbound” by After is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 764% to 639 points.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 144 sales units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 435 streams units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 38 airplay units.
“Outbound” by After is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 579,544 total units.
